error_message: failed to resolve: use of unresolved module or unlinked crate `kd3`
error_snippet:
|
3 | use kd3::kdtree::{KDTree, KDTreeIterator, Point};
  |     ^^^ use of unresolved module or unlinked crate `kd3`
  |
  = help: if you wanted to use a crate named `kd3`, use `cargo add kd3` to add it to your `Cargo.toml`

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0433`.
